scripts.build:plugin-wheel: cd snakemake-executor-plugin-wasm && if [ -x .pixi/envs/default/bin/python ]; then .pixi/envs/default/bin/python -m build --wheel; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 -m build --wheel; else python -m build --wheel; fi
scripts.sync:plugin-wheel: npm run build:plugin-wheel && mkdir -p static/wheels && cp -f snakemake-executor-plugin-wasm/dist/snakemake_executor_plugin_wasm-*-py3-none-any.whl static/wheels/
scripts.sync:assets: npm run sync:pyodide && mkdir -p static/wheels static/v86 static/thirdparty/v86 && rsync -a --delete ../wheels/ static/wheels/ && npm run sync:plugin-wheel && rsync -a --delete ../v86/ static/v86/ && rsync -a --delete ../thirdparty/v86/ static/thirdparty/v86/ && cp -f ../Snakefile static/Snakefile
scripts.build:app: npm run check && npm run build
